title: Create Basics
description: A light Modpack centered around the Create Mod. It mainly features QoL and Vanilla+ mods
body:
# Create Basics A Vanilla+ modpack centered around the Create Mod using my [Vanilla Augmented](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla_augmented) Modpack as a base, which has bunch of quality of life mods, performance improvements and some multiplayer features to provide a great SMP experience
If you wanna know more about exactly what is included look at the [Modrinth Page](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla_augmented) for it. All additional mods are listed below

Voice chat can trigger sculk related stuff, make sure to tweak your volume in a way that anything below -32dB is you whispering for the best experience ## Main Feature Mods * [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) - Amazing aesthetic Technology Mod
* [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric) - Expansion for Farming and cooking
* [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) - Backpacks, because there are too many items in Minecraft
* [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) - Some awesome Vanilla+ items and more
Mod List #### !This list of mods is only applies to the newest published version!
#### All the other mods that are included can be explored in the mod list for [Vanilla Augmented](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla_augmented)
### Create [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
[Create: Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails) - More features for the create train system
[Create Enchantment Industry Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry-fabric) - Create interop with experience and enchanting
[Create Support for Open Parties and Claims](https://modrinth.com/mod/opac-fabric-create-support) - Make OPAC work with Create
### Farming [Farmer's Delight [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric) - Additions to the farming and cooking
[Delightful Creators [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/delightful-creators-fabric) - Make Farmer's Delight be more automatable
### Other [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) - Backpacks!
[Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) - Many Vanilla+ additions
[amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) - Things that were previously in Supplementaries and other additions
[Soulbound Enchantment](https://modrinth.com/mod/soulbound-enchantment) - Enchantment so you don't loose your best gear

[Cardinal Components API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cardinal-components-api) - Library needed for Traveler's Backpack
[Moonlight Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/moonlight) - Library needed for Supplementaries
